# kSecPrivateKeyAttrs

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a dictionary of cryptographic key attributes specific to a private key.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPrivateKeyAttrs: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDictionary] containing key-value pairs for attributes specific to the private key to be generated.
title: kSecPrivateKeyAttrs
